prompt: A glimpse into history: 'VERITAS' shines in ornate gold leaf lettering on an aged parchment page. Intricate, swirling borders rich with colorful foliage frame this timeless word, reminiscent of classic manuscript illumination.
prompt_refined: An aged parchment page featuring the word 'VERITAS' in ornate, shining gold leaf lettering, centrally framed by intricate, swirling borders rich with colorful foliage, in the style of classic manuscript illumination.
